title: Brave New World: Advertising Sportsbooks in Ontario (and the rest of Canada)
content:
## Brave New World: Advertising Sportsbooks in Ontario (and the rest of Canada)
Learn how operators, marketing affiliates, promotional partners, and lawyers are navigating the advertising restrictions applicable to Sportsbooks operating in Ontario (and the rest of Canada).  What are the challenges? What are the opportunities? Our panelists weigh in.
Gianluca Mazzanti, Associate, McCarthy Tetrault
- Andrew Garven, Head of Marketing, Covers
- Jared Beber CEO, Bet99
- Marissa Caldwell, Associate, McCarthy Tetrault​
- ​Andrew Stokes, Senior Director, Maple Leaf Sports & Entertainment’s  Global Partnerships Group
Read a summary of Marissa's comments here: Ontario Regulator Urges Operators To Stay Within Advertising Standards | GamblingCompliance | VIXIO
- Marissa Caldwell Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
- Gianluca Mazzanti Associate People.Offices.Plural New York, Toronto
People.Offices.Plural New York, Toronto
